landing.heroSubtitle: Book a personalized demo or a consulting session with our specialists. In minutes, via WhatsApp.
landing.featuresSubtitle: From custom software to strategic consulting. Our team guides you at every stage.
landing.feature1Desc: See our software in action. Tailored to your industry and specific needs.
landing.feature2Desc: Strategic sessions with specialists to diagnose, plan and execute your digital transformation.
landing.feature3Desc: Post-implementation support. Your team will always have fast answers and solutions.
landing.ctaSectionDesc: Book now. No commitments, no complications.

booking.sidebarDesc: Select the type of session that best fits your needs and choose the ideal time.
booking.expect2: We'll send you the video call link 24h before
booking.expect3: Our specialist will arrive prepared with your context
booking.title: Choose your session
booking.subtitle: Select the meeting type and specialist to see available times.
booking.noSlots: No slots available for this day.
booking.confirmationDesc: Your session has been registered. You'll receive WhatsApp confirmation shortly.
booking.errorLoadData: Could not load data. Please verify the link is valid.
booking.errorAllFields: Please fill in all fields to book.
booking.errorBooking: Could not book. Please check the information and try again.

confirmation.alreadyConfirmed: This session has already been confirmed.
confirmation.alreadyCancelled: This session has already been cancelled.
confirmation.reviewDetails: Please review the details and confirm or cancel the session.
confirmation.notFound: We couldn't find the session. The link may be invalid.
confirmation.confirmConfirm: Confirm this session? A WhatsApp message will be sent to the client.
confirmation.confirmCancel: CANCEL this session? A WhatsApp message will be sent to the client.

login.subtitle: Sign in with your administrator or collaborator account.
